codeReview.summary: The admin/governance review doc satisfies VAL-ADMIN-001. It covers admin user management, changelog publishing, support-ticket GitHub sync, settings/runtime controls, export approvals, and governance risk hotspots with code-grounded evidence and clear control-boundary analysis.

summary: PASS. The admin/governance review artifact is thorough, aligned with the validation contract, and did not present review-level defects beyond the application risks it intentionally documents.
